case_title: SCOTT HAEFNER VS. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/SUPERIOR COURT

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAEFNER, SCOTT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/SUPERIOR COURT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2013 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $194.00 FILED BY HAEFNER, SCOTT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/SUPERIOR COURT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-2013 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-26-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/SUPERIOR COURT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-25-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-25-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY FRANK TAYLOR--CCSF INVESTIGATOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/SUPERIOR COURT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAEFNER, SCOTT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/SUPERIOR COURT $80.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $80.00, DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $80.00, AN AMOUNT WHICH HAS ALREADY BEEN PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
